chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. D 207 of 2025 _____________________________________________________________ Date Order with Signature of Judge _____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on Misc. No.1043/2025 2. For order on office objection NO.16 & 22 3. For orders on Misc. No.1044/2025 4. For hearing of main case 21.01.2025 Mr. Tajjamul Hussain Lodhi, advocate for the petitioner 1. Granted. 2-4. The petitioner seeks appointment as Police Constable through orders of this Court. It is his contention that he participated in some process in the year 2022, however, has been found ineligible on account of being deficient in height. There is no cavil to height being a prerequisite for the relevant recruitment. The height of the petitioner and other such qualifying physical attributes are a matter of factual enquiry, notwithstanding the deficiency having been highlighted by the petitioner's counsel himself. It is apparent that no vested right has been demonstrated before us to merit invocation of the discretionary1 writ jurisdiction of this Court and even otherwise this matter is fraught with factual controversy, not amenable for adjudication in writ jurisdiction2. In view hereof, this petition is found to be misconceived, hence, hereby dismissed in limine. Judge Judge Amjad 1 Per Ijaz Ul Ahsan J. in Syed Iqbal Hussain Shah Gillani vs. PBC & Others reported as 2021 SCMR 425; Muhammad Fiaz Khan vs. Ajmer Khan & Another reported as 2010 SCMR 105. 2 2016 CLC 1; 2015 PLC 45; 2015 CLD 257; 2011 SCMR 1990; 2001 SCMR 574; PLD 2001 Supreme Court 415.
